intent: 2BR / 1 bath LDK smoke test, no carport. 10x10 lot gives a 6x6 envelope = 36 m2 floor -- the empirical minimum feasible size for this topology (9.9x9.9 is infeasible). Single common bath sits at the rear next to kitchen (no ensuite, no separate bath band). Public side is a real living/dining/kitchen split (not open-plan great_room) -- living, dining, and kitchen stack front-to-rear in one column, the solver's default LDK arrangement.
must_haves: common bath publicly accessible from dining
separate living, dining, and kitchen rooms stacked front-to-rear
